items.title: Stokes' matchwinning hundred steals the thunder on Hundred's opening night
items.summary: Former England captain defies leg injury to produce winning display in front of 1,300 crowd at Derby
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: New Auburn coach Alex Golesh confident QB Byrum Brown will thrive in SEC after stellar career at South Florida
items.summary: One of Golesh's first big moves after being hired by the Tigers was to bring Brown with him to the Plains
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Forest make enquiry for Sporting's Diomande
items.summary: Sporting receives an enquiry from Nottingham Forest for centre-back Ousmane Diomande.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
